creator: exploringlondon
caption:
The world’s greatest biscuit shop is now open at @fortnums Piccadilly. This is the brand-new Biscuitorium, with the most incredible giant replica of Fortnums made entirely from biscuits that took over 500 hours to make, and every variety of biscuits you can think of, including the Whoppalossus, a massive biscuit stuffed with marshmallow, that’s bigger than your hand and costs £30! Share this with the biscuit lovers in your life!!

📍 Biscuitorium, Fortnum and Mason, Piccadilly

transcription.text: Come with me and you'll be in a world of pure imagination. Take a look and you'll see into your imagination.
